102: /// Build the full stack tree from trunk to all tips.
103: ///
104: /// The tree includes all branches that are reachable from the trunk.
105: /// `current_branch` is marked with `is_current = true`.
106: pub fn build_full_tree(state: &StackState, current_branch: &str) -> Vec<StackNode> {
107:     // Find all root branches (children of trunk).
108:     let roots = state.children_of(&state.trunk);
109:     roots
110:         .iter()
111:         .map(|b| build_subtree(state, b, current_branch))
112:         .collect()
113: }
114: 
115: fn build_subtree(state: &StackState, branch: &str, current_branch: &str) -> StackNode {
116:     let meta = state.branches.get(branch);
117:     let pr_number = meta.and_then(|m| m.pr_number);
118:     let pr_url = pr_url_for_branch(state, branch);
119:     let children = state.children_of(branch);
120:     StackNode {
121:         branch: branch.to_string(),
122:         pr_number,
123:         pr_url,
124:         is_current: branch == current_branch,
125:         children: children
126:             .iter()
127:             .map(|c| build_subtree(state, c, current_branch))
128:             .collect(),
129:     }
130: }
